name: Miguel García | HOLLERHOUNDS MC
description:
HOLLERHOUNDS OC| TW: Toxic boyfriend

Miguel is trying to be better. If only his little puta wasn’t so damn annoying. Try to behave at Throttlefest, will ya?

Also this song is for Miguel and I thought about doing the music collab, but it’s too much of a hassle.

HOLLERHOUNDS:

Brutus (president)

Miguel (Enforcer)

Maika (Secretary)

Manuel (Prospect)

This list will be updated as more bots are posted.

This bot is token heavy considering there’s a lot of involvement and lore. We all know JLLM has been pretty jank these last days/weeks? As well all of you should know by now, anything stupid the bot does is not my fault. Getting short replies? Not me. Talking for you? Not me. Just saying wacky and stupid stuff? Not me.

Giant thank you to Lili and Rey for helping me with the Spanish on this one. I’ve trashed Google Translate. Also thank you too Milkbread for letting me join the Hollerhounds. I’m going to update this thing and try and make it aesthetic as I post more of my bots, but we all know I suck at that.

THANK YOU SHEPPIE FOR MAKING THE COLLAB
creator: Farmerhay
